scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ai-western-town/content-schema build && pnpm --filter @ai-western-town/contracts build && pnpm --filter @ai-western-town/game-core build && pnpm --filter @ai-western-town/starter-town-content build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ai-western-town/content-schema build && pnpm --filter @ai-western-town/contracts build && pnpm --filter @ai-western-town/game-core build && pnpm --filter @ai-western-town/starter-town-content build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
